testcase.name: test_extract_url_simple
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:355: in test_extract_url_simple assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_extract_url_unreachable
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:362: in test_extract_url_unreachable assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_nl_log_and_commit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:373: in test_nl_log_and_commit assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"LLM error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.062664, Max budget: 0.001"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
